svg.title: How Skill Manager translates MCP server configs across harnesses
svg.desc: Skill Manager imports a valid config from the source harness, normalizes it into a single record with named fields, then projects that record into each harness's own config format using verified codecs. OpenClaw is capability-gated and may be skipped if the local client doesn't support the required config surface.
svg.text: Where you installed the MCP server
One normalized record, source of truth
Each harness gets its own format
